{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/73300841?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ex-cal1bur", "id": 73300841, "login": "ex-cal1bur", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjczMzAwODQx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ex-cal1bur", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42568", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-90", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an LDAP Query ('LDAP Injection')"}], "description": "### Summary

An LDAP injection vulnerability exists in `org.yamcs.security.LdapAuthModule` when constructing search filters. The username parameter is inserted directly into the LDAP filter without proper RFC 4515 escaping.

### Root Cause

**File:** `yamcs-core/src/main/java/org/yamcs/security/LdapAuthModule.java:233`

The `username` parameter is inserted directly into an LDAP search filter without RFC 4515 escaping:

```java
// VULNERABLE
var filter = userFilter.replace("{0}", username);
var searchResult = getSingleResult(ctx, userBase, filter, controls);
```

LDAP wildcard characters (`*`, `(`, `)`) are accepted without sanitization.

### Impact

With a known valid password, `username=*` authenticates as the first user returned by the LDAP search — enabling horizontal privilege escalation between accounts sharing similar passwords or when the attacker knows one valid password.

This affects deployments that use `org.yamcs.security.LdapAuthModule` in their `etc/security.yaml` configuration file.

### Proof of Concept

```bash
curl -X POST "http://TARGET:8090/auth/token" \
  -d "grant_type=password&username=*&password=known_password"
# Returns token for first matching LDAP user
```

### Fix

Apply RFC 4515 escaping before filter construction:

```java
private static String escapeLdapFilter(String input) {
    return input
        .replace("\\", "\\5c")
        .replace("*",  "\\2a")
        .replace("(",  "\\28")
        .replace(")",  "\\29")
        .replace("\0", "\\00");
}
var filter = userFilter.replace("{0}", escapeLdapFilter(username));
```", "epss": {"percentage": 0.01027, "percentile": 0.59515}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cqh3-jg8p-336j", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-26T23:39:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cqh3-jg8p-336j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cqh3-jg8p-336j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42568"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-10T23:16:46Z", "published_at": "2026-05-26T23:39:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/yamcs/yamcs/security/advisories/GHSA-cqh3-jg8p-336j", "https://github.com/yamcs/yamcs/releases/tag/yamcs-5.12.7", "https://github.com/yamcs/yamcs/releases/tag/yamcs-5.13.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42568", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cqh3-jg8p-336j"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/yamcs/yamcs/security-advisories/GHSA-cqh3-jg8p-336j", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/yamcs/yamcs", "summary": "Yamcs Vulnerable to LDAP Injection in LdapAuthModule", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-11T14:05:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cqh3-jg8p-336j", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.12.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.yamcs:yamcs-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.12.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Yamcs Vulnerable to LDAP Injection in LdapAuthModule
